additional_rules.description: GMCC WVOE P&L — qualify borrowers using Verbal Verification of Employment plus a Profit & Loss statement prepared by a CPA. Suitable for self-employed and business owners who prefer P&L over bank statements. Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes AK).
additional_rules.income_docs: WVOE (Verbal VOE) + CPA-prepared Profit & Loss statement (12 or 24 months).
additional_rules.see_guidelines: Refer to GMCC training materials for current LTV, FICO, and reserve requirements.

general_notes: GMCC WVOE P&L — Non-QM program qualifying income via Verbal VOE and CPA-prepared P&L statement.
Suitable for self-employed borrowers and business owners who prefer P&L over bank statements.
Available in all 49 GMCC-licensed states (excludes Alaska).
Purchase, rate/term refi, and cash-out refi. Primary, investment, and second home eligible.
Specific LTV, FICO, reserves, and DTI limits vary by investor — refer to GMCC guidelines.
